final:
module lfsr (
	input clk,
	output reg [7:0] count);

always @(posedge clk) begin
	count <= {count[6:0], count[7] ^ count[5] ^ count[4] ^ count[0]};
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= {count[6:0], ~count[7] & ~count[5] & ~count[4] & ~count[0]};
    end
  end

endmodule
